ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the security is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the security */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) for the security */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) for the security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Specific exchange where the security is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the model is applied to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the model's application */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the model's application */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the predictive model */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
